name: @constellation-network/openclaw-audit-plugin
description: Tamper-evident audit trail with Digital Evidence anchoring for AI coding agent activity

dbPath.description: Path to the SQLite database file for audit storage

localRetentionDays.description: Auto-delete local events after N days (default: 365)

localMaxSizeMb.description: Prune oldest events when DB exceeds this size in MB (default: 500)

notificationWebhook.description: Webhook URL for Slack, Discord, or generic notifications on config changes and integrity violations

openclawDir.description: Path to the OpenClaw configuration directory (default: ~/.openclaw)

deApiKey.description: Digital Evidence API key for audit trail anchoring

deEnv.description: Digital Evidence network environment (default: mainnet). 'test' requires the DE_TEST_URL environment variable pointing at a loopback URL; used for local development only.

deOrgId.description: Digital Evidence organization ID (UUID) for fingerprint submission

deTenantId.description: Digital Evidence tenant ID (UUID) for fingerprint submission

deSigningKey.description: SECP256K1 private key (64-char hex) for signing fingerprints. If omitted, an ephemeral key is generated.

deWalletKeyFile.description: Path to file containing a SECP256K1 private key (64-char hex) for wallet-based x402 payment auth. Derives orgId and tenantId from wallet address automatically.

deEventThreshold.description: Number of events to accumulate before anchoring to DE (default: 100)

deTimerMinEvents.description: Minimum events required to anchor on a timer tick (default: 1, clamped to >= 1)

deIntervalMs.description: Maximum time between DE anchoring attempts in milliseconds (default: 300000)

redactPromptText.description: Replace prompt/message content with sha256 hash before storing (default: false)

redactToolArgs.description: Replace tool-call arguments with sha256 hash before storing (default: false)

fileWatchPatterns.description: Glob patterns for files to watch for changes (e.g. ["src/**/*.ts", "config/*.json"])

fileWatchIntervalMs.description: Polling interval in milliseconds for file watching when fileWatchUsePolling is true (default: 1000)

fileWatchIgnorePatterns.description: Glob patterns to exclude from file watching (e.g. ["**/node_modules/**", "**/.git/**"])

fileWatchUsePolling.description: Use polling instead of native fs events for file watching (default: false). Enable for network mounts.

gatewayUrl.description: swarm-deck gateway base URL to publish audit events to (e.g. https://gateway.example.com). Events are POSTed to <gatewayUrl>/admin/audit/ingest. Plain http:// is rejected unless the host is loopback (localhost, 127.0.0.1, [::1]); private/link-local IPs are rejected unless gatewayAllowPrivateHost is true. Leave unset to disable gateway publishing.

gatewayApiKey.description: swarm-deck gateway API key (sk-gw-...) sent in the X-Gateway-Api-Key header. Must match a token grammar (no whitespace, CR/LF, or quotes); validated at construction. Required when gatewayUrl is set.

gatewayBatchSize.description: Maximum number of events per POST batch (default: 50, clamped to >= 1)

gatewayIntervalMs.description: Maximum time between gateway POST attempts in milliseconds (default: 30000, clamped to >= 1000)

gatewayTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for gateway POST requests in milliseconds (default: 15000, clamped to >= 1000)

gatewayBufferCapacity.description: Maximum number of events buffered in memory awaiting POST. Once full, new events are dropped and a synthetic gateway.dropped audit event is recorded locally on an exponential cadence (default: 10000, clamped to >= 1)

gatewayShutdownDeadlineMs.description: Wall-clock deadline for the shutdown drain in milliseconds. Exits early if the gateway is slow so SIGTERM can complete within container grace periods (default: 30000, clamped to >= 1000)

gatewayMaxPayloadBytes.description: Maximum JSON payload size for a single POST. Oversized batches are dropped with a warn log rather than retried forever (default: 5000000)

gatewayIncludeContent.description: When true, full event content (prompts, tool args) is forwarded to the gateway. Default false: event.content is stripped from the payload regardless of redactPromptText / redactToolArgs settings, since those govern only local storage. Enable only when the gateway is the trusted source of truth for full content.

gatewayAllowPrivateHost.description: When true, allows the gateway URL to point at a private/link-local IP (10.x, 172.16-31.x, 192.168.x, 169.254.x, 100.64.0/10, fc00::/7, fe80::/10) over https. Default false (rejected) to mitigate SSRF risk from misconfiguration.

gatewayEnabled.description: Explicit on/off switch for gateway publishing. Defaults to true when gatewayUrl + gatewayApiKey are both set; the only way to disable when both are present is gatewayEnabled: false (literal boolean — string "false" is ignored with a warning).
